     the Fermi energy is    -0.4715 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.85867699 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.4E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08765424 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.77102275 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238388.65969739 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120295.51076759 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.06849000 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110535.46027101 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01387396 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.64 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  34 iterations
